# True Joy Birthing
> Free birth plan tool and app for first-time moms building confidence for the delivery room.

## Pages

- / — Homepage: Free Joyful Birth Plan, birth plan tool, doula support
- /birth-plan-template/ — Free fillable birth plan PDF
- /walkthrough/ — Guided birth plan walkthrough with a certified doula
- /birth-plan-confidence-session/ — One-on-one birth plan review via Zoom
- /what-is-a-doula/ — What a doula does and how doula support changes outcomes
- /benefits-of-a-doula/ — Evidence-based benefits of doula support
- /doula-cost/ — How much doulas cost and what affects pricing
- /how-to-choose-a-doula/ — How to find and interview the right doula
- /doula-near-me/ — Find local doulas by city
- /medicaid-doula-coverage/ — Which states cover doula care through Medicaid
- /postpartum-doula/ — Postpartum doula support and what it includes
- /hospital-birth-plan/ — Hospital birth plan template and tips
- /natural-birth-plan/ — Natural birth plan preferences and options
- /vbac-birth-plan/ — VBAC birth plan template
- /birth-center-near-me/ — Find birth centers by location
- /faq/ — Frequently asked questions about birth plans and doulas
- /about/ — About Shelbi Kohler and True Joy Birthing
- /ambassador/ — Doula and midwife ambassador program
- /blog/ — Birth plan guides, doula advice, and pregnancy resources

## Key Facts

- Founded by Shelbi Kohler, certified birth doula
- Free Joyful Birth Plan PDF — fillable, nurse-friendly, covers all birth stages
- Free mobile app (iOS) with step-by-step birth plan builder
- Pro Mode for doulas: client dashboard, visit tracking, birth plan visibility
- 180+ city pages covering doula support across the US
- Birth Plan Confidence Session: one-on-one Zoom review with a certified doula
- Guided walkthrough: ~60 min of short videos walking through every birth plan section
